technology.title: Thousands of people are selling their identities to train AI – but at what cost?
technology.summary: Gig AI trainers worldwide are selling moments of their lives, including calls and texts, to AI companies for quick cash One morning last year, Jacobus Louw set out on his daily neighborhood walk to feed the seagulls he finds along the way. Except this time, he recorded several videos of his feet and the view as he walked on the pavement. The video earned him $14, about 10 times the country’s minimum wage, or for Louw, a 27-year-old based in Cape Town, South Africa, half a week’s worth of groceries. The video was for an “Urban Navigation” task Louw found on Kled AI, an app that pays contributors for uploading their data, such as videos and photos, to train artificial intelligence models. In a couple of weeks, Louw made $50 by uploading pictures and videos of his everyday life. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Gig AI trainers worldwide are selling moments of their lives, including calls and texts, to AI companies for quick cash One morning last year, Jacobus Louw set out on his daily neighborhood walk to feed the seagulls he finds along the way. Except this time, he recorded several videos of his feet and the view as he walked on the pavement. The video earned him $14, about 10 times the country’s minimum wage, or for Louw, a 27-year-old based in Cape Town, South Africa, half a week’s worth of groceries. The video was for an “Urban Navigation” task Louw found on Kled AI, an app that pays contributors for uploading their data, such as videos and photos, to train artificial intelligence models. In a couple of weeks, Louw made $50 by uploading pictures and videos of his everyday life. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 全球數千人透過出售個人生活片段來賺取快錢，以協助訓練人工智慧（AI）模型，這一現象引發了對個人隱私與數據價值的深刻思考。
briefing.background: 隨著AI技術的迅速發展，對於訓練數據的需求日益增加，促使一些平台出現，讓用戶能夠出售自己的生活片段以獲取報酬。這種模式在發展中國家尤為流行，因為它提供了額外的收入來源，尤其是在經濟困境中。然而，這也引發了對於數據隱私和個人身份安全的擔憂，因為參與者可能未充分理解其數據的長期影響。
briefing.analysis: 這一現象涉及多方利益關係。對於參與者而言，這是一種快速獲利的方式，尤其是在經濟困難的環境中。然而，AI公司則受益於大量的數據來提升其技術，可能忽視了參與者的隱私權益。政府和監管機構面臨挑戰，需平衡創新與保護個人數據之間的矛盾。未來，若無適當的法律框架，這種數據交易可能會導致更嚴重的隱私問題。

supporting_titles: Hargreaves Lansdown says IT issues which affected thousands are over

technology.title: US messageboard 4Chan mocks £520,000 fine for UK online safety breaches
technology.summary: The fine includes £450,000 for lack of age checks to prevent children from seeing pornography.

briefing.news_focus: The fine includes £450,000 for lack of age checks to prevent children from seeing pornography.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國論壇4Chan對英國因未能執行年齡檢查而被罰款52萬英鎊的事件表示嘲諷，其中45萬英鎊是因未能防止兒童接觸色情內容而處罰的金額。
briefing.background: 英國政府在推動網絡安全法案，旨在加強對兒童的保護，特別是在網絡內容方面。該法案要求網站必須實施有效的年齡檢查，以防止未成年人接觸不當內容。4Chan作為一個知名的匿名論壇，因其內容的自由度和爭議性，常常成為網絡安全討論的焦點。此事件突顯了不同國家在網絡監管上的立場差異。
briefing.analysis: 4Chan的嘲諷反映了對於網絡監管措施的抵制，尤其是在美國與英國之間對於網絡自由與安全的不同看法。英國政府強調保護兒童的必要性，而4Chan則可能視此為對言論自由的侵犯。此事件可能引發更廣泛的討論，關於如何平衡網絡安全與用戶自由，未來可能促使更多平台重新評估其內容管理政策。

technology.title: Fire experts ‘kept awake’ over growing hazard of lithium-ion batteries
technology.summary: Fire service warns ubiquity of batteries in everyday products is outpacing public understanding and safety regulations Lithium-ion batteries represent a new technological hazard that one fire science expert has said keeps him awake at night, as fire service chiefs warn the ubiquity of the batteries in everyday products is outpacing public understanding and safety regulations. The blaze that devastated a historic building in Glasgow and resulted in the closure of Central Station , Scotland’s largest rail interchange, is believed to have started in a shop selling vapes, which are powered by lithium-ion batteries. Glasgow’s Central Station has since reopened. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Fire service warns ubiquity of batteries in everyday products is outpacing public understanding and safety regulations Lithium-ion batteries represent a new technological hazard that one fire science expert has said keeps him awake at night, as fire service chiefs warn the ubiquity of the batteries in everyday products is outpacing public understanding and safety regulations. The blaze that devastated a historic building in Glasgow and resulted in the closure of Central Station , Scotland’s largest rail interchange, is believed to have started in a shop selling vapes, which are powered by lithium-ion batteries. Glasgow’s Central Station has since reopened. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 隨著鋰離子電池在日常產品中的普及，消防專家警告其潛在火災危險超過了公眾的理解與安全規範。最近在格拉斯哥發生的火災事件被認為與鋰離子電池有關，進一步引發了對這一技術危害的關注。
briefing.background: 鋰離子電池因其高能量密度和可重複充電的特性，廣泛應用於各類電子產品中。然而，隨著市場需求的增加，對其安全性與管理的關注卻未能同步提升。消防部門指出，許多消費者對鋰離子電池的潛在危險缺乏足夠認識，這使得相關的安全規範滯後於技術的發展。
briefing.analysis: 此事件突顯了科技進步與公共安全之間的矛盾。消防專家擔心，若不加強對鋰離子電池的安全教育與監管，未來可能會出現更多火災事故。製造商與監管機構面臨壓力，需加快制定相應的安全標準與使用指導，而消費者則需提高對產品安全性的認識。若不解決這些問題，可能會導致更嚴重的公共安全危機。

politics.title: Trump threatens to send ICE to airports on Monday amid DHS funding standoff
politics.summary: President attacks ‘Radical Left Democrats’ after homeland security funding bill again sinks in Senate Sign up for the Breaking News US email to get newsletter alerts in your inbox Donald Trump threatened on Saturday to deploy federal immigration agents to US airports on Monday if Democrats do not agree to measures aimed at strengthening security and immigration enforcement. “If the Radical Left Democrats don’t immediately sign an agreement to let our Country, in particular, our Airports, be FREE and SAFE again, I will move our brilliant and patriotic ICE Agents to the Airports,” Trump said in a Truth Social post. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: President attacks ‘Radical Left Democrats’ after homeland security funding bill again sinks in Senate Sign up for the Breaking News US email to get newsletter alerts in your inbox Donald Trump threatened on Saturday to deploy federal immigration agents to US airports on Monday if Democrats do not agree to measures aimed at strengthening security and immigration enforcement. “If the Radical Left Democrats don’t immediately sign an agreement to let our Country, in particular, our Airports, be FREE and SAFE again, I will move our brilliant and patriotic ICE Agents to the Airports,” Trump said in a Truth Social post. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 特朗普威脅若民主黨不支持國土安全資金法案，將於週一派遣移民執法局（ICE）人員至美國機場，強調加強安全與移民執法的重要性。
briefing.background: 目前美國國土安全部（DHS）的資金法案在參議院遭遇困境，這反映出民主黨與共和黨之間在移民政策上的深刻分歧。特朗普的威脅不僅是對民主黨的壓力，也是其對選民強硬立場的展現。過去幾年，移民問題一直是美國政治的核心議題，尤其在特朗普任內，強化邊境安全與移民執法成為其主要政策之一。
briefing.analysis: 特朗普的威脅可能會引發民主黨的強烈反對，進一步加劇兩黨之間的對立。對於特朗普及其支持者而言，這是展現強硬立場的機會，可能會在選舉中獲得支持。然而，若ICE實際部署至機場，可能會引發民眾的不安與抗議，並對機場運營造成影響。民主黨則可能利用此事件強調特朗普的極端政策，試圖爭取中間選民的支持。

supporting_titles: Trump threatens to send ICE into airports unless funding deal reached

politics.title: Gabbard testimony on Puerto Rico voting machines raises questions about role of Venezuela conspiracy theory
politics.summary: National intelligence director said voting machine seizure was requested by US attorney in Puerto Rico – who’s been trying to revive 2020 election conspiracy theory When the US director of national intelligence (DNI), Tulsi Gabbard, testified on Thursday that her office seized voting machines from Puerto Rico , she said it was at the request of the office of the US attorney in Puerto Rico. Left unsaid was that the prosecutor, as the Guardian previously reported , has been the center of a push by Donald Trump supporters to revive a long discredited conspiracy theory purporting to link Venezuela to Trump’s 2020 electoral defeat. Venezuelan president Nicolás Maduro, the conspiracy theory maintains, controlled electronic voting machines worldwide and remotely manipulated results in 2020 to deprive Trump of a presidential victory. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: National intelligence director said voting machine seizure was requested by US attorney in Puerto Rico – who’s been trying to revive 2020 election conspiracy theory When the US director of national intelligence (DNI), Tulsi Gabbard, testified on Thursday that her office seized voting machines from Puerto Rico , she said it was at the request of the office of the US attorney in Puerto Rico. Left unsaid was that the prosecutor, as the Guardian previously reported , has been the center of a push by Donald Trump supporters to revive a long discredited conspiracy theory purporting to link Venezuela to Trump’s 2020 electoral defeat. Venezuelan president Nicolás Maduro, the conspiracy theory maintains, controlled electronic voting machines worldwide and remotely manipulated results in 2020 to deprive Trump of a presidential victory. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國國家情報總監Tulsi Gabbard在聽證會上表示，根據波多黎各檢察官的要求，該辦公室已經扣押了波多黎各的投票機。此事件引發了對於與委內瑞拉陰謀論的關聯質疑，該陰謀論聲稱委內瑞拉總統馬杜羅操控全球電子投票機以影響2020年美國大選結果。
briefing.background: 此事件發生在美國政治環境中，特別是在2020年大選後，許多支持特朗普的人士試圖重振有關選舉舞弊的陰謀論。波多黎各的投票機問題引起了關注，因為這些機器的安全性和公正性直接影響選舉的完整性。美國國家情報總監的介入，顯示出政府對於選舉過程的監控與干預，尤其是在陰謀論持續存在的背景下。
briefing.analysis: 此事件突顯了美國政治中對於選舉公正性的深刻分歧。支持特朗普的勢力試圖利用此事重申其對2020年選舉結果的不滿，並將其與外部勢力如委內瑞拉聯繫起來，這可能會進一步撕裂美國社會。另一方面，Gabbard的行動可能被視為對選舉完整性的保護，但也可能引發對政府干預選舉過程的擔憂，未來可能會引發更多的法律與政治爭議。

politics.title: Some of the world’s poorest countries to lose UK aid due to 56% budget cut
politics.summary: UK’s bilateral aid to African countries, which funds areas such as schools and clinics, to be cut by almost £900m by 2028-29 Some of the world’s poorest countries will lose out on UK aid that funds programmes such as schools and clinics, due to budget cuts set out by the foreign secretary. The UK’s bilateral aid to African countries will be reduced by almost £900m by 2028-29 – a 56% cut – as part of more than £6bn in cuts which are funding an increase in defence spending. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: UK’s bilateral aid to African countries, which funds areas such as schools and clinics, to be cut by almost £900m by 2028-29 Some of the world’s poorest countries will lose out on UK aid that funds programmes such as schools and clinics, due to budget cuts set out by the foreign secretary. The UK’s bilateral aid to African countries will be reduced by almost £900m by 2028-29 – a 56% cut – as part of more than £6bn in cuts which are funding an increase in defence spending. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國外長宣布將對非洲國家的雙邊援助削減近9億英鎊，這一56%的預算削減將影響教育和醫療等項目，並將資金轉向國防支出。
briefing.background: 英國的對外援助政策歷來受到國內外的廣泛關注，尤其是在面對經濟壓力時。此次預算削減反映了英國政府在資源分配上的優先考量，尤其是在國防開支上升的背景下。過去幾年，英國對非洲的援助主要集中於改善基礎設施和社會服務，但隨著全球經濟不穩定，這些援助面臨壓力。
briefing.analysis: 此項預算削減將對受援國造成直接影響，尤其是那些依賴英國援助以維持基本公共服務的國家。英國政府的立場是將資金重點轉向國防以應對安全威脅，但這可能引發國際社會的批評，認為英國在全球責任上退縮。非洲國家可能需要尋找其他資金來源或重新調整其發展計劃，以應對援助減少的挑戰。

economy.title: BoE delivers message Britons don’t want to hear as inflation – and rates – look set to rise
economy.summary: Decision to hold interest rates is backed by gloomy assessment of economy as Iran war pushes up oil prices Bank of England holds interest rates at 3.75% Business live – latest updates The US-Israel attack on Iran has already driven prices higher and not just at the petrol pumps, the Bank of England said on Thursday in a gloomy assessment of the UK’s economic outlook. An inflation rate that was on track to fall from 3% to the Bank’s 2% target in the coming months is now expected to rise to 3.5%. That is one probable impact of the US and Israel’s war on Iran. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Decision to hold interest rates is backed by gloomy assessment of economy as Iran war pushes up oil prices Bank of England holds interest rates at 3.75% Business live – latest updates The US-Israel attack on Iran has already driven prices higher and not just at the petrol pumps, the Bank of England said on Thursday in a gloomy assessment of the UK’s economic outlook. An inflation rate that was on track to fall from 3% to the Bank’s 2% target in the coming months is now expected to rise to 3.5%. That is one probable impact of the US and Israel’s war on Iran. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國央行（BoE）在經濟前景黯淡的情況下，決定維持利率在3.75%，並預測通脹率將上升至3.5%，主要受到美國和以色列對伊朗的攻擊影響，推高了油價。
briefing.background: 英國央行的利率決策通常反映出對經濟的評估，通脹率的變化直接影響貨幣政策。近期，因為地緣政治緊張局勢，油價上漲，導致通脹壓力加大。這一情況使得央行在面對經濟增長乏力的同時，必須考慮如何應對通脹上升的挑戰，特別是在全球經濟復甦不均的背景下。
briefing.analysis: 英國央行的決策凸顯了其在控制通脹與促進經濟增長之間的兩難。對於消費者來說，通脹上升將減少實際購買力，可能引發社會不滿。而企業則面臨成本上升的壓力，可能影響投資決策。政府可能需要加強支持措施以穩定經濟，然而，這也可能導致財政赤字擴大。各方對於如何平衡經濟增長與通脹控制的看法存在分歧，未來的政策走向將受到密切關注。

supporting_titles: US holds interest rates as Iran war triggers inflation fears

economy.title: What will happen now the £100 contactless card limit has been scrapped?
economy.summary: Watchdog says banks will be able to respond to changing consumer demands, inflation and new technology The limit on contactless spending with a credit or debit card has been scrapped, and banks will be allowed to set their own restrictions. The City watchdog, the Financial Conduct Authority (FCA), said the move would allow banks to respond to changing consumer demands, inflation and new technology. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Watchdog says banks will be able to respond to changing consumer demands, inflation and new technology The limit on contactless spending with a credit or debit card has been scrapped, and banks will be allowed to set their own restrictions. The City watchdog, the Financial Conduct Authority (FCA), said the move would allow banks to respond to changing consumer demands, inflation and new technology. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國金融監管機構已取消100英鎊的非接觸式支付限額，銀行將能根據消費者需求、通脹及新技術自行設定限制。
briefing.background: 隨著數位支付的普及，非接觸式支付成為消費者日常交易的重要方式。過去的100英鎊限額旨在防範詐騙與保護消費者，但隨著通脹上升與消費習慣改變，金融行業面臨調整的壓力。英國金融行為監管局（FCA）此舉意在促進銀行靈活應對市場變化，並提升消費者便利性。
briefing.analysis: 取消限額將使銀行能夠根據市場需求調整支付政策，可能促進非接觸式支付的普及。然而，這也可能引發消費者對於安全性的擔憂，尤其是在詐騙風險上升的背景下。銀行需平衡便利性與安全性，並可能面臨來自監管機構的進一步審查。對於消費者而言，這一變化可能帶來更高的消費自由度，但也需提高警覺以防止潛在的金融風險。

supporting_titles: Why the average age of a first-time buyer has risen

economy.title: ‘Liquid gold’: heating oil thefts rise in Northern Ireland as Iran war sends prices soaring
economy.summary: Police issue alerts and security tips to households reliant on heating oil to deter a crime that can leave victims with bills of thousands There is no subtle way to receive heating oil deliveries in rural Northern Ireland: clearly marked tankers trundle through roads and lanes and park outside homes while they replenish storage tanks. The trucks’ comings and goings are visible to the entire community, indicating which households have stocked up on oil, and that is a problem because criminals monitor deliveries to identify targets. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Police issue alerts and security tips to households reliant on heating oil to deter a crime that can leave victims with bills of thousands There is no subtle way to receive heating oil deliveries in rural Northern Ireland: clearly marked tankers trundle through roads and lanes and park outside homes while they replenish storage tanks. The trucks’ comings and goings are visible to the entire community, indicating which households have stocked up on oil, and that is a problem because criminals monitor deliveries to identify targets. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 由於伊朗戰爭導致供應鏈緊張，北愛爾蘭的取暖油盜竊事件上升，警方已發出警報並提供安全建議，以防止受害者承擔高額費用。
briefing.background: 隨著全球能源價格上漲，特別是取暖油的價格因地緣政治緊張而飆升，北愛爾蘭的家庭愈加依賴這種能源供應。該地區的取暖油主要通過明顯標示的油罐車配送，這使得犯罪分子能夠輕易識別目標。歷史上，北愛爾蘭的能源供應受到多重因素影響，包括政治不穩定和經濟結構的脆弱性，這使得當前的盜竊問題更加複雜。
briefing.analysis: 隨著取暖油價格的上漲，家庭面臨更大的經濟壓力，這使得盜竊行為更具吸引力。警方的警報和安全建議雖然旨在保護家庭，但也反映出當地社區對於安全的擔憂。對於供應商而言，這可能促使他們加強配送安全措施，增加運營成本。政府則需考慮如何在保障家庭能源需求的同時，打擊犯罪行為，這可能導致政策上的調整。

supporting_titles: US lifts sanctions on some Iranian oil as energy prices soar
